bucket_roles.parser: grammar acceptance rejection and ambiguity coverage
bucket_roles.semantic: type system effect isolation ownership and behavior coverage
bucket_roles.lowering_abi: lowering runtime bridge and ABI boundary coverage
bucket_roles.module_roundtrip: interface emit import and metadata preservation coverage
bucket_roles.diagnostics: required diagnostic and fix-it behavior coverage
bucket_roles.examples: reader-facing example parity and tutorial-backed feature coverage
bucket_roles.spec_open_issues: known-spec-gap accounting and unresolved requirement tracking
bucket_roles.workpacks: historical planning shards retained for traceability only

gap_axes: example or tutorial path not covered
coverage_gap_model.claim_boundary: release-facing corpus claims must be traceable to checked-in manifests coverage-map families and deterministic executable evidence
